title: Bubbly Clean Hands
lesson: Washing your hands keeps germs away and keeps you healthy.
prompts: In a bright sunny garden — leafy green plants, warm natural sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image plays happily on the grass with a small toy spade, hands a little muddy, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a cheerful smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene just inside a bright home doorway leading toward the kitchen before a snack. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, facing three-quarter toward the camera with their face clearly visible and slightly muddy hands held up. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels gently and points toward a bathroom sink down the hall. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm indoor light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright home bathroom — a sink with running water, light tiles — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone at the sink, stepping up onto a small step stool and reaching for a colourful bar of soap, a bottle of hand soap on the counter, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a curious smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright home bathroom — a sink with running water, light tiles — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone at the sink, upright and turned slightly to one side, rubbing two soapy hands together with lots of fluffy white bubbles, the hands held off to one side at chest height so they do not cover the face, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a delighted, giggling smile. Only this one child is at the sink, alone in the frame, with no second child, twin, sibling or reflection anywhere. Medium shot at eye level, sparkling bubbles, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright home bathroom — a sink with running water, light tiles — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone at the sink, holding up freshly rinsed clean hands under the running tap, hands held to one side so they do not cover the face, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a proud, beaming smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A warm scene at a sunny kitchen table set for a snack. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a happy smile, clean hands resting beside a plate of fruit. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits across the table, passing over a piece of fruit and looking on warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, cheerful morning light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: You played outside in the garden, digging in the dirt. What fun! But your hands got all muddy.
"Time for a snack — but first, wash your hands," said Mum, pointing toward the sink.
You climbed up on your little stool and reached for the soap. Twist, twist — on came the water.
You rubbed your hands together and made lots of fluffy bubbles. Scrub-a-dub, so many bubbles!
Then you rinsed all the bubbles away. Your hands were squeaky clean! You held them up, so proud.
You sat down for your snack with clean, happy hands. No more germs — hooray!
